subcodes.first_line: All praise to the hallowed sanctuary of the Desired One, the One Who brought forth the Most Great Mercy from out of pure wrath
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت قدس حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که از غضب صرف رحمت کبری ظاهر نمود و از
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @power of prayer, @war and peace, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @power of love, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love as fire
